Id1.text: The periapsis of the 1001 Gaussia (formally known as 1923 OAA907 XC) is 419113394.55312 km and it has an epoch date of the 31st July 2016.

Id2.text: 1001 Gaussia, which was formerly called "1923 OAA907 XC", has an epoch date of 31 July 2016 and a periapsis of 419113394.55312 kilometres.
